{ "author": "Felix Geisendörfer <felix@debuggable.com> (http://debuggable.com/)", "name": "combined-stream", "description": "A stream that emits multiple other streams one after another.", "version": "1.0.8", "homepage": "https://github.com/felixge/node-combined-stream", "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git://github.com/felixge/node-combined-stream.git" }, "main": "./lib/combined_stream", "scripts": { "test": "node test/run.js" }, "engines": { "node": ">= 0.8" }, "dependencies": { "delayed-stream": "~1.0.0" }, "devDependencies": { "far": "~0.0.7" }, "license": "MIT" }
